trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no entries—there are no staff notes, delivery confirmations, carrier tracking numbers, or prior customer complaints recorded. The order shows Item Status: Shipped (Qty Shipped: 1), Order Status: Complete, Grand Total: $158.95, Total Paid: $158.95, Total Refunded: $0.00.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000631 → Comments History tab (empty); Order Summary and Items Ordered sections on http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/631/.
WHY IT MATTERS: Without any notes or tracking details in Comments History, there is insufficient evidence to confirm or refute the customer’s claim that the package was never delivered. Although the system indicates the item was shipped and the order is complete, the absence of delivery confirmation or prior investigation requires escalation to verify shipment tracking and carrier delivery status before approving or denying a refund.
